name: Integration - Ticket Status Retrieval Workflow
description: Tests the end-to-end workflow for retrieving the status of an existing ticket, including intent classification, validation, ServiceNow API call, and response formatting.
input: POST /agent/message with user_message: 'What is the status of ticket INC123456?'
output: AgentResponse with success=True and response containing the ticket status
success_criteria: ServiceNowAPIClient.get_ticket_status is called with correct ticket_id
response.response contains 'status of ticket INC123456 is'
error_scenarios: Ticket ID not found in ServiceNow
